fallback: flag off == PREFILL_V2 (byte-identical, default off); ineligible shapes fall through silently
note: 1.27x < 1.35x strong gate: only FFN routed (attn_q/o ~17% of matmul not routed) + per-linear x/out transposes; a [feature,T] block restructure + attn_q/o routing would push toward strong. External rocBLAS/Tensile HSACO artifact, research-only.

quality_dNLL.note: all roles incl attn_q/o routed (route_count confirms); quality-neutral (Tensile fp16 ~ tinygrad fp16)

A5_attn_qo_routed.pp1024: not validated (model warmstart shape-specific to UBATCH=512)

llama_comparison.note: routed tinygrad EXCEEDS llama pp512 by ~1.41x. matmuls are the same rocBLAS Tensile kernels (~95% peak) -> the margin over llama is in the non-matmul portion (tinygrad fused attention/norms) + low per-chunk overhead; a per-component breakdown would attribute it precisely. Both warm GPU prompt-processing of 512 tokens.
